name: Whole Wheat Honey-Walnut Bread - Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (except liquids and yeast) inside the bread pan.
2. Add liquid ingredients: water, honey, and butter.
3. Close the cover and place the dry yeast into the yeast holder.
4. Select WHOLE WHEAT BAKE MODE.
5. Press start. The timer will display 5:00.
